opening_npc_line: I need that report on my desk by 5pm. No excuses.

turns.user_input: what can i do from my side i tried my best but from client side requirement is not finalized yet. thats because i cannot completed the report ontime
turns.npc_response: Stop making excuses and find a way to work with what you have, I didn't hire you to wait for perfect data. Get creative and give me something to review, even if it's not complete.

turns.user_input: this what i have completed upto now. it is 80% complete
turns.npc_response: That's still 20% short of what I need, I expect to see the full report, not some incomplete draft, finish it now and don't waste any more time.

turns.user_input: ok i'll finished the report working overtime! that's you want to here am i right
turns.npc_response: Spare me the drama, just get the report done, and don't expect any praise or rewards for doing what's expected of you, just meet the deadline.

turns.user_input: you get the full completed report sharp 5pm. ok
turns.npc_response: See that you do, I'll be watching the clock, and if it's even a minute late, there will be consequences, got it?
Don't just "got it", make sure you deliver, I'm still waiting to see if you can actually come through on your promises.

turns.user_input: i make sure you get the report on time and i responsible for that and i tell my coworkers to do their best to deliver the report on time
turns.npc_response: I don't pay your coworkers to do their best, I pay them to deliver results, and I'm holding you accountable for making sure that happens, so keep them on track.
